posts.title: Project Spotlight: Continuum
posts.description: Continuum, built by Hack the Valley participant Mofe, captures an AI chat and resumes it in a fresh one so you never lose context to length limits.
posts.excerpt: A weekend idea now live on Chrome and Firefox: Mofe's Continuum captures an AI chat and resumes it in a fresh one, so you never lose context to length limits.

posts.title: Welcome to the Hack the Valley blog
posts.description: Why we started a blog, and what you can expect to find here.
posts.excerpt: We are turning one hackathon into a year-round community. Here is where we will share recaps, project highlights, and what comes next.
